description: Escrow buyer scrip for a purchase attempt. Pre-decrements buyer balance when they request a purchase via exchange:buy. Amount equals price + fee. Scrip is held in escrow until match+settle completes or expires_at is reached (auto-refund). Buyer balance must be >= amount (enforced by Forge PreDecrement — if this message exists, PreDecrement succeeded). State effect: buyer balance decreases by amount, amount held in escrow keyed by reservation_id.

args.name: buyer
args.description: Ed25519 public key (hex) of the buyer.

args.name: amount
args.description: Total hold in micro-tokens: price + fee.

args.name: reservation_id
args.description: Forge SpendingLimiter reservation ID. Used to settle or refund the escrow.

args.name: buy_msg
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:buy request that triggered this hold.

args.name: expires_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when hold auto-refunds if not settled. Must be in the future.
